_spec: npc.relationship_changed → UPDATE npc_pc_relationship_projection {other_entity_type, reality_id, trust_level, familiarity_count, last_session_id=payload.session_id, relationship_labels=payload.labels}, keyed npc_id(=aggregate_id)+other_entity_id (NpcPcRelationshipProjection, crates/projections/npc/src/lib.rs:164). Durable NPC↔PC trust/familiarity. NOTE: the arm reads each field via payload.get(), so an ABSENT payload key projects as NULL — this fixture supplies all six to pin the full row.
